Chain Lightning

Triggers: Once in a while

Strikes the closest enemy with lightning that deals 22500 damage. The lightning jumps over to nearby enemies up to 6 times. Stuns when dealing damage. With each jump, damage is reduced by 30%.

Requirements: 90-100
